Name: 🏯 Hiroshima National Peace Memorial Hall for the Atomic Bomb Victims
Description: Genbaku-Dome Mae tram (3 min). Free; quiet underground memorial — pair with Peace Museum.  •  📍 Open in Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Hiroshima+National+Peace+Memorial+Hall+for+the+Atomic+Bomb+Victims/data=!4m2!3m1!1s0x355aa20d45357859:0xdb8a027ea4994e41

Name: 🏯 Atomic Bomb Dome
Description: Genbaku-Dome Mae tram (1 min). Free outdoor view 24/7; sunset light is the photo.  •  📍 Open in Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Atomic+Bomb+Dome/data=!4m2!3m1!1s0x355aa20cdb2780a9:0x34e6677ae0c6c096

Name: 🏯 Hiroshima Castle
Description: Kamiyacho-nishi tram (10 min walk). Reconstructed castle — keep ¥370 inside, gardens free.  •  📍 Open in Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Hiroshima+Castle/data=!4m2!3m1!1s0x355a98a6eaf7e7c3:0xf57be92cb5339632

Name: 🏯 Itsukushima Jinja
Description: Miyajima ferry from Miyajima-guchi (10 min). Floating torii — check tide chart, high tide AM is the shot.  •  📍 Open in Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Itsukushima+Jinja/data=!4m2!3m1!1s0x601ae3047ec76d8f:0x357228f7d0b5d590

Name: 🏨 THE KNOT HIROSHIMA
Description: Hatchobori tram (5 min). Booked. Walk to Peace Park in 15 min.  •  📍 Open in Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/place/THE+KNOT+HIROSHIMA/data=!4m2!3m1!1s0x355aa21307545537:0x3577cd31df89ecf7

Name: 🛍️ Andersen Hiroshima Depachika
Description: Hondori tram (2 min). Hiroshima's depachika-style bakery hall — momiji-manju at Nishiki-do, oysters fresh upstairs. (Hidden gem · Depachika)
